title: Verify existing implementation of role hierarchy checker
description: The role hierarchy checker has already been implemented in `src/auth/role-hierarchy.ts` with the `hasPermission(userRole: string, requiredRole: string): boolean` function following hierarchy admin > editor > viewer > guest. Comprehensive tests in `src/auth/role-hierarchy.test.ts` cover all 16 permission combinations plus invalid role handling and hierarchy ordering. All 23 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/utils/result.ts - utility module pattern with Result<T, E> discriminated union
src/auth/user-store.ts - Role type definitions and role-based patterns
